title: 💻 GitHub - awattar/claude-code-best-practices: 💻 Best practices and examples for using Claude Code - Anthropic’s terminal-native AI - for writing, editing, and refactoring code with deep project awareness, prompt design, and safe automation. · GitHub
content:
Claude Code 技术干货

# awattar/claude-code-best-practices. * [`/custom-init`](https://github.com/awattar/claude-code-best-practices/blob/main/.claude/commands/custom-init.md). * [`/help-commands`](https://github.com/awattar/claude-code-best-practices/blob/main/.claude/commands/help-commands.md). * [`/commit`](https://github.com/awattar/claude-code-best-practices/blob/main/.claude/commands/commit.md). Uses standardized commit templates from [`.gitmessage`](https://github.com/awattar/claude-code-best-practices/blob/main/.gitmessage) and [`.github/COMMIT_CONVENTION.md`](https://github.com/awattar/claude-code-best-practices/blob/main/.github/COMMIT_CONVENTION.md). * [`/issue`](https://github.com/awattar/claude-code-best-practices/blob/main/.claude/commands/issue.md). Integrates with GitHub PR templates from [`.github/pull_request_template.md`](https://github.com/awattar/claude-code-best-practices/blob/main/.github/pull_request_template.md). * [`/reviewpr`](https://github.com/awattar/claude-code-best-practices/blob/main/.claude/commands/reviewpr.md). * [`/test`](https://github.com/awattar/claude-code-best-practices/blob/main/.claude/commands/test.md). > **Note:** Commands also leverage Claude Code's built-in [`general-purpose`](https://docs.anthropic.com/en/docs/claude-code/sub-agents) agent for complex multi-step analysis and file searching. * [`general-solution-architect`](https://github.com/awattar/claude-code-best-practices/blob/main/.claude/agents/general-solution-architect.md). * [`general-technical-writer`](https://github.com/awattar/claude-code-best-practices/blob/main/.claude/agents/general-technical-writer.md). * [`general-pm`](https://github.com/awattar/claude-code-best-practices/blob/main/.claude/agents/general-pm.md). * [`general-fullstack-developer`](https://github.com/awattar/claude-code-best-practices/blob/main/.claude/agents/general-fullstack-developer.md). * [`general-backend-developer`](https://github.com/awattar/claude-code-best-practices/blob/main/.claude/agents/general-backend-developer.md). * [`general-frontend-developer`](https://github.com/awattar/claude-code-best-practices/blob/main/.claude/agents/general-frontend-developer.md). * [`general-devops`](https://github.com/awattar/claude-code-best-practices/blob/main/.claude/agents/general-devops.md). * [`general-qa`](https://github.com/awattar/claude-code-best-practices/blob/main/.claude/agents/general-qa.md). * [`general-code-quality-debugger`](https://github.com/awattar/claude-code-best-practices/blob/main/.claude/agents/general-code-quality-debugger.md). * [`general-technical-project-lead`](https://github.com/awattar/claude-code-best-practices/blob/main/.claude/agents/general-technical-project-lead.md). * [`conventional-commits`](https://github.com/awattar/claude-code-best-practices/blob/main/.claude/skills/conventional-commits/SKILL.md). See the [Skills documentation](https://docs.anthropic.com/en/docs/claude-code/skills) for authoring details, including bundling scripts and reference files alongside `SKILL.md`. The repository ships a checked-in [`.claude/settings.json`](https://github.com/awattar/claude-code-best-practices/blob/main/.claude/settings.json) that demonstrates two of the most useful project-level configuration mechanisms:. * [`Best Practices for Agentic Coding`](https://www.anthropic.com/engineering/claude-code-best-practices). Each task in this document includes clear instructions, example commands, and best practices to help you get the most from Claude Code."*. 💻 Best practices and examples for using Claude Code - Anthropic’s terminal-native AI - for writing, editing, and refactoring code with deep project awareness, prompt design, and safe automation. title: 💻 Claude Code Best Practices: Lessons From Real Projects
content:
Claude Code 技术干货

**In this post, I’ll break down my Claude Code setup, when I use BMAD vs plan mode, how I structure CLAUDE.md, and the lessons I learned after shipping three real projects.**. | AI SDLC | [BMAD Method](https://github.com/bmadcode/BMAD-METHOD) for large projects, Claude Code plan mode for smaller features |. | Skills | Security review (built-in), [SEO analysis, Google Analytics, web accessibility](https://github.com/ziniman/ai-instruct), [web design](https://github.com/anthropics/claude-code/tree/main/plugins/frontend-design) |. When I built it, I used Claude Code alongside [BMAD](https://github.com/bmadcode/BMAD-METHOD), an [AI SDLC framework](/blog/ai-driven-sdlc/) that guides you through product design, user flows, and specifications before you write a single line of code. Follow the [official guidelines](https://code.claude.com/docs/en/memory#set-up-a-project-claude-md). The next thing on my list is getting serious about the [skill creator](https://docs.anthropic.com/en/docs/claude-code/skills) and turning more of my Serverless blog posts into proper Serverless custom skills, using my own published content as the authority of knowledge, so that Claude Code reviews against the same standards I write about publicly.

title: 💻 Claude Code Batch Processing Complete Guide: /batch Command and Headless Mode in Practice - SmartScope
content:
Claude Code 技术干货

* /batch Command: Parallel Execution of Large-Scale Code Changes. * Headless Mode (claude -p): CI/CD and Script Integration. # Claude Code Batch Processing Complete Guide: /batch Command and Headless Mode in Practice¶. The `/batch` command in Claude Code shines when you need to apply the same transformation across hundreds of files. * The `/batch` command executes codebase-wide migrations safely using **parallel agents + Git Worktree** isolation. * Headless mode (`claude -p`) provides **non-interactive integration** for CI/CD pipelines and shell scripts. Intermediate to advanced Claude Code users looking to scale up with large-scale changes and CI/CD integration. The latter is a non-interactive execution mode for embedding AI processing into CI/CD pipelines. | Aspect | /batch Command | Headless Mode (claude -p) |. Choose headless mode when embedding AI processing into existing CI/CD pipelines. `/batch` is a slash command executed within an interactive Claude Code session1. ## Headless Mode (claude -p): CI/CD and Script Integration¶.

title: 💻 Claude Code: Batch processing with Message Batches API | Claude Cookbook
content:
Claude Code 技术干货

# Batch processing with Message Batches API. Process large volumes of Claude requests asynchronously with 50% cost reduction using batches. Message Batches allow you to process large volumes of Messages requests asynchronously and cost-effectively. This cookbook demonstrates how to use the Message Batches API to handle bulk operations while reducing costs by 50%. Let's start with a simple example that demonstrates creating and monitoring a batch of message requests. `# Prepare a list of questions for batch processing. "messages": [{"role": "user", "content": question}],. print(f"Batch ID: {response.id}"). print(f"Status: {response.processing_status}"). Now let's monitor the batch processing status:. print(f" Processing: {batch_result.request_counts.processing}"). Once the batch is complete, we can retrieve and process the results:. batch = client.beta.messages.batches.retrieve(batch_id). print(f"Status: {batch.processing_status}"). for result in client.beta.messages.batches.results(batch_id):. print(f"Status: {result.result.type}"). print(f"Content: {result.result.message.content[0].text[:200]}..."). This example demonstrates more advanced usage, including error handling and processing different types of requests in a single batch including a simple message, a message with a system prompt, a multi-turn message, and a message with an image.

title: 💻 Claude Code: Batch processing - Claude API Docs
content:
Claude Code 技术干货

We use cookies to deliver and improve our services, analyze site usage, and if you agree, to customize or personalize your experience and market our services to you. # Batch processing. Batch processing is a powerful approach for handling large volumes of requests efficiently. Instead of processing requests one at a time with immediate responses, batch processing allows you to submit multiple requests together for asynchronous processing. The Message Batches API is Anthropic's first implementation of this pattern. # Message Batches API. The Message Batches API is a powerful, cost-effective way to asynchronously process large volumes of Messages requests. ## How the Message Batches API works. When you send a request to the Message Batches API:. Almost any request you can make to the Messages API can be included in a batch. Since each request in the batch is processed independently, you can mix different types of requests within a single batch. A Message Batch is composed of a list of requests to create a Message.
